caption: Two men are seated in a room, positioned in front of a television. The man on the left wears a grey t-shirt and maintains a neutral, observant facial expression. The man on the right, also in a grey t-shirt and wearing a necklace, has his hand near his mouth. Behind them is a television screen displaying the glowing yellow text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" and a shelf filled with numerous DVDs or CDs. A small potted plant sits to the far left. A smaller inset video window is superimposed on the center of the screen, showing a woman with long dark hair wearing a brown dress in a dimly lit setting with candles. Throughout the sequence, the men remain mostly still, with slight shifts in their gaze and posture as they watch the inset video, while the woman in the inset window remains in a similar pose.
